hero.title: Book a court, or join open play
hero.subtitle: Check availability and pay in one app. See spots left in real time.

features.title: Everything in one app
features.subtitle: From finding a court to paying — all in one place

realtime.title: Real-time availability
realtime.desc: Live slot updates. No phone calls, no double bookings.

modes.title: Private or open play
modes.desc: Rent the whole court, or join an open play session per person.

pay.title: Easy, secure payments
pay.desc: Card or PromptPay QR, confirmed automatically.

notify.title: LINE reminders
notify.desc: Booking confirmations and reminders before you play.

modes.title: Pick what fits you
modes.subtitle: Come with your crew, or solo — both are fun

private.title: Private court
private.desc: Rent the whole court for your group. Choose your time. Priced per hour.

open.title: Open play
open.desc: Join a shared session, meet new players, pay per head. Great for going solo.

step1.title: Find a court
step1.desc: Pick a venue near you, see reviews and amenities.

step2.title: Choose a time
step2.desc: Book a private court or join open play.

step3.title: Pay and done
step3.desc: Confirmed instantly via Stripe, receipt on LINE.

cta.title: Ready to hit the court?
cta.subtitle: Find players, book your favorite court, start today

footer.tagline: The easiest way to book pickleball

myBookings.title: My bookings
myBookings.subtitle: Manage upcoming bookings and view history

bookingFlow.title: Confirm booking
